name: SCOTTISH MORTG.INV.LS-,05
summary: Scottish Mortgage Investment Trust PLC is an investment trust that invests globally in publicly traded and private companies with long-term growth potential. The trust aims to identify and invest in businesses that are expected to experience significant growth over the long term. TICKER: Scottish Mortgage Investment Trust PLC is an investment trust that invests globally in companies with long-term growth potential, aiming to identify and invest in businesses expected to experience significant growth.
